name: Pervine LTD Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: Washington Secretary of State Corporations & Charities Filing System (ccfs.sos.wa.gov) - portal requires interactive search and direct API endpoint returned 404
notes: No matching record in FMCSA SAFER for 'PERVINE' (keyword search returned zero hits). The truncated company name 'Pervine LTD Which Will Do Bus[iness As ...]' is characteristic of a historical corporate filing where the full DBA tail was cut off in source data — the actual corporate name is likely just 'Pervine Ltd' with a DBA. Address '3820 Soundview Dr W, University Place, WA 98466' is a single-family residence (3 bed / 2 bath, built 1956, last sold 2014 per Zillow/Redfin), strongly suggesting this was a home-based or historical filing, not an active fleet operator. Not listed in WA UTC charter/excursion bus registry or OSPI school bus depreciation system. Likely defunct or dissolved entity.
